allow: PowerShell($env:CHROME_BIN = \(Get-Command chrome.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(-not $env:CHROME_BIN\) { $p = 'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe'; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $env:CHROME_BIN = $p } }; Write-Output "CHROME_BIN=$env:CHROME_BIN")

PowerShell($env:CHROME_BIN = 'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe'; npx ng test --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless --code-coverage 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'SUCCESS|FAILED|TOTAL|Error|Coverage|Statements|Branches|Functions|Lines' | Select-Object -Last 30)

PowerShell($env:CHROME_BIN = 'C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe'; npx ng test --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'TOTAL|FAILED|ERROR' | Select-Object -Last 20)
